meta.summary: TAFFISH first-party Python helper runtime for matrix-level scRNA-seq import, QC, filtering, Scanpy analysis, marker ranking, candidate annotation, tables, plots, and h5ad handoff.
meta.description: TAFFISH first-party Python helper runtime for matrix-level scRNA-seq import, QC, filtering, Scanpy analysis, marker ranking, candidate annotation, tables, plots, and h5ad handoff.

test: scrnaseq-python-versions --tsv | grep -F 'scrnaseq-python' | grep -F '0.1.0' >/dev/null && scrnaseq-python-versions --tsv | grep -F 'scanpy' | grep -F '1.12.1' >/dev/null && python -c 'import scanpy, anndata, numpy, pandas, scipy, matplotlib, seaborn, sklearn, statsmodels, numba, networkx, pynndescent, umap, igraph, leidenalg; from skmisc.loess import loess; print("ok")' | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null && scrnaseq-python-import --help | grep -F 'Import 10x matrix' >/dev/null && scrnaseq-python-analysis --help | grep -F 'Leiden' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-scrnaseq-python-h5ad-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; python -c 'import anndata as ad, numpy as np, pandas as pd; X=np.array([[1,0,3],[0,2,1],[4,0,0]], dtype="float32"); obs=pd.DataFrame(index=["cell1","cell2","cell3"]); var=pd.DataFrame(index=["GeneA","GeneB","MT-GeneC"]); ad.AnnData(X=X, obs=obs, var=var).write_h5ad("tiny.h5ad")' && scrnaseq-python-import --h5ad tiny.h5ad --sample-id tiny --outdir out && test -s out/adata.raw.h5ad && test -s out/input_summary.tsv && grep -F 'h5ad' out/input_summary.tsv >/dev/null && scrnaseq-python-summarize --h5ad out/adata.raw.h5ad --outdir summary && test -s summary/h5ad_summary.tsv && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-scrnaseq-python-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/scrnaseq-python/share/testdata/scrnaseq_python_smoke.py "$tmp/out" && test -s "$tmp/out/import/adata.raw.h5ad" && test -s "$tmp/out/qc/plots/qc_violin.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/filter/adata.filtered.h5ad" && test -s "$tmp/out/analysis/tables/clusters.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/analysis/plots/umap_by_cluster.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/marker/markers/cluster_markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/annotation/annotation/cluster_annotation.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/summary/h5ad_summary.tsv" && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: TAFFISH scrnaseq-python runtime
upstream.citation: Wolf, Angerer, and Theis. SCANPY: large-scale single-cell gene expression data analysis. Genome Biology 19, 15 (2018).
